title: Explorers And Chambers
description: Explorers And Chambers is a modpack to play with friends, discover magic and explorate new structures like the new and revamped Trial Chambers with lots of things to explore.
body:
This is an multiplayer exploration modpack that adds new things such as new Trial Chambers and revamps the old one from 1.21 adding new content such as the copper golem, new armors and enemies. This modpack also adds artifacts, daily quests, more enchantments and much more things to have fun with.

All credits to the original mod creators, go suport them!
Try out the Ancient Artifacts 2 Datapack too it has a lot of things to explore and discover:
https://modrinth.com/datapack/ancient-artifacts-2
